title: ceiba aesculifolia subsp. parvifolia
intro: Ceiba aesculifolia subsp. parvifolia is a lesser-known sub-species of the Ceiba aesculifolia tree, native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Ceiba aesculifolia subsp. parvifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
